live_migration_support_notes: Use logical replication slot with exported snapshot and LSN cutover fence; physical replication remains evidence only.
primary_method: logical replication slot with exported snapshot
initial_snapshot_or_seed: exported snapshot, base backup, COPY, or dump tied to LSN
delta_feed_or_change_capture: logical replication/pgoutput ordered by LSN and commit messages
proxy_method: PostgreSQL wire proxy with database/schema/table readiness routing
alternate_or_fallback: FDW/query polling or trigger/audit only with waiver; physical replication is migration evidence, not target apply authority
required_cutover_barrier: logical slot caught up to cutover LSN; sequences/routines/security mapped; representative query compare clean
parser_worker_scope: parse donor migration commands/wire/API messages; classify route; render donor diagnostics; no execution/finality authority
sbup_role_a_scope: trusted Role A bridge/proxy/source connector after engine admission; normalizes source events to DonorLiveIngestEventRecord; invokes admitted SBLR/internal procedures only
engine_mga_rule: destination ScratchBird MGA owns target commit visibility rollback recovery cutover evidence; donor feed tokens are evidence only
proof_tests: project/tests donor regression original baseline emulation steady-state active live-migration proxy mirror crash-restart idempotent replay rollback cutover performance and support bundle proofs
